content.full_text:
May 31, 2001

Ernest Tracy, Board Clerk
Butte Valley Unified School District
Post Office Box 787
Dorris, CA 96023-0787

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-120

Dear Mr. Tracy:

This letter memorializes the withdrawal of your May 14, 2001, correspondence requesting advice on the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ with regard to Butte Valley Unified School District Board Member, Shirley Deane.

As I advised you in our May 25, 2001, telephone conversation, the Commission does not render advice on past conduct. I enclose a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review.

Please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions or comments.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William L. Williams
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

WLW:jg
Enclosure

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
